originalTitle: Philips Hue’s budget-friendly Essential starter kit has hit a new low price
summary: Although most of Prime Day’s unusually good Philips Hue deals have ended, a few remain, and some, including the black Philips Hue Twilight Sleep and Wake-Up Light, are even cheaper. None, however, have fallen to a new all-time low price like Philips Hue’s Essential starter kit. Right now, you can buy a bundle containing four […]
content: Although most of Prime Day’s unusually good Philips Hue deals have ended, a few remain, and some, including the black Philips Hue Twilight Sleep and Wake-Up Light, are even cheaper. None, however, have fallen to a new all-time low price like Philips Hue’s Essential starter kit. Right now, you can buy a bundle containing four white and color E26 bulbs and a Hue Bridge for $79.99 ($40 off) at Amazon. Since that’s the same price as the two-bulb Essential starter kit, it’s like getting two bulbs for free. [Product: Philips Hue Essential starter kit, | https://www.amazon.com/Philips-Hue-Essential-Starter-Kit/dp/B0FMGR8TGB?th=1&tag=theverge02-20, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.philips-hue.com%2Fen-us%2Fp%2Fhue-white-and-color-ambiance-essential-starter-kit-4-e26-smart-bulbs-800-lm%2F046677608989] Each of the color-changing bulbs can display millions of colors or tunable white light ranging from a warm 2200K to a cooler 6500K, while producing up to 800 lumens of brightness. The Hue app also offers a preset lighting scenes for everything from movie nights to the holidays, though you can also create your own. Meanwhile, the included Hue Bridge lets you control the lights when you’re away from home, create schedules, connect up to 50 lights throughout your home, and set automations so they can, for instance, turn on automatically when you arrive home. It also allows you to control the lights through all the major smart home platforms, thanks to Matter compatibility. As Philips Hue budget-friendly kits, there are a few premium features they lack that are worth mentioning. Most notably, the bulbs only dim to two percent instead of 0.2 percent. Philips Hue also doesn’t guarantee they’ll match the color accuracy of its flagship bulbs across generations. If you’re simply looking to fill your home with colorful smart lighting at a reasonable price, though, those differences may not matter much to you.
chineseTitle: 飞利浦 Hue 经济型 Essential 入门套件价格再创新低
chineseSummary: 尽管大多数 Prime Day 异常优惠的飞利浦 Hue 促销活动都已经结束，但仍有一些促销活动保留下来，其中一些产品（包括黑色飞利浦 Hue Twilight Sleep 和 Wake-Up Light）甚至更便宜。然而，没有一个产品像飞利浦 Hue 的 Essential 入门套件那样跌至历史新低。现在，您可以购买包含四个 [...] 的捆绑包
chineseContent: 尽管大多数 Prime Day 异常优惠的飞利浦 Hue 促销活动都已经结束，但仍有一些促销活动保留下来，其中一些产品（包括黑色飞利浦 Hue Twilight Sleep 和 Wake-Up Light）甚至更便宜。然而，没有一个产品像飞利浦 Hue 的 Essential 入门套件那样跌至历史新低。现在，您可以在亚马逊上以 79.99 美元（优惠 40 美元）的价格购买包含四个白色和彩色 E26 灯泡和一个 Hue Bridge 的捆绑包。由于这与两个灯泡 Essential 入门套件的价格相同，因此就像免费获得两个灯泡一样。 [产品：飞利浦 Hue Essential 入门套件，| https://www.amazon.com/Philips-Hue-Essential-Starter-Kit/dp/B0FMGR8TGB?th=1&tag=theverge02-20， https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.philips-hue.com%2Fen-us% 2Fp%2Fhue-白色和彩色氛围-essential-starter-kit-4-e26-smart-bulbs-800-lm%2F046677608989]每个变色灯泡可以显示数百万种颜色或可调白光，范围从暖色 2200K 到冷色 6500K，同时产生高达 800 流明的亮度。 Hue 应用程序还提供了从电影之夜到假期的各种预设照明场景，但您也可以创建自己的场景。同时，附带的 Hue Bridge 可以让您在出门在外时控制灯光、创建时间表、连接整个家中最多 50 盏灯，并设置自动化，以便它们可以在您到家时自动打开。由于 Matter 兼容性，您还可以通过所有主要智能家居平台控制灯光。作为飞利浦 Hue 的经济型套件，它们缺乏一些值得一提的高级功能。最值得注意的是，灯泡仅调暗 2%，而不是 0.2%。飞利浦 Hue 也不保证其色彩准确度能与其旗舰灯泡相匹配。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
